steps.title: Look for shared information
steps.content: The student wants a similarity between the Laas Geel paintings and the Dhagah Nabi Galay paintings. The notes show that both are ancient rock art in Somaliland included in Horn Heritage’s scanning project.

steps.title: Choose the shared feature
steps.content: Choice A mentions only Dhagah Nabi Galay. Choice B emphasizes a difference between writing and human or animal figures. Choice C mentions only Laas Geel. The statement that both are ancient rock art found in Somaliland gives a clear similarity. The answer is D.
